findings.summary: Dirty-worktree/source-file wording must be qualified: this read-only reviewer did not modify source files and the cited v2/v3 artifacts are added evidence, but git status shows unrelated modified tracked files outside .evidence/reviews.

checks_reviewed.evidence: xhigh records the prior NO_GO P-4 overstatement: P-4 must not be classified as fully absent; partial rollback governance/artifacts are cited.
v2 records the prior NO_GO C5 issue: screenless work routing was overstated as fixed Mobile Architect + Backend/API + Implementation rather than relevance-based routing.
v3 records GO: P-4 is corrected to partial rollback support, C5 is corrected to relevant-role routing, and only residual non-blocking gaps remain.

Dirty worktree details: modified tracked files outside .evidence/reviews include PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT.md, docs/CODEX_MCP_ENVIRONMENT.md, docs/confluence/20260608-codex-expo-rn-runtime-sot-update.md, evals/skills/project-bootstrap-agent-setup-smoke.sh, and mobile-app-dev-team/09-pod-native-openclaw-skills/project-bootstrap files; untracked evidence includes the cited xhigh, v2, and v3 review artifacts under .evidence/reviews.
The review request is a read-only final planning reviewer check and explicitly states implementation gates are NOT_APPLICABLE.

residual_risks: Design relevance and Design not-applicable handling remain residual SoT specialization gaps, not blockers for this corrected final planning review.
Cross-work-unit prioritization and emergency hotfix fast-path are not defined in the reviewed SoT.
A complete app/EAS/OTA rollback operational runbook remains absent even though rollback governance is partially defined.
